_tailorNote: Core badges (clutch, g2, hubspot, salesforce, soc2) registered by Module 2D. Optional podcast/speaking badges added by /tailor-factory from research Sub-task 5. Optional badges render only when the client supplies the SVG file and sets the id in brand-dna.trust_badges.
